name: Cream of Sweet Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the sweet potatoes.
2. Place the potatoes in a Dutch oven with the broth. Bring to a boil, cover, and reduce heat.
3. Simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.
4. Place half of the potato slices and half of the broth in a blender. Add nutmeg, cloves, soy milk, and salt. Puree.
5. Repeat with the remaining potatoes and broth.
6. Return the blended mixture to the Dutch oven. Stir to blend and reheat over low heat.
Per serving: 84 calories, 3 grams protein, 154 milligrams sodium, 15 grams carbohydrates, 1 gram fat, 0 cholesterol, 46 milligrams calcium
Hints: This soup makes a delicious first course. For a full meal, serve it with rice salad and cookies for dessert.
Sprinkle with nutmeg.
Source: Lynda Pozel in Vegetarian Gourmet (Winter 1993)
